purpose: Scoreable rubric for an iikit routing+stage invocation. Each criterion is pass/fail; all must pass for dod=pass.

criteria.rule: Exactly one playbook was read; topic resolved to a single enum value.
Described intent routed to the earliest unmet stage; ambiguity resolved with one question, no fan-out.
Predecessor artifact existed or was explicitly created; no stage ran on a missing predecessor.
Prescribed iikit-core scripts were run (script-first); missing/non-zero scripts surfaced verbatim, not assumed-success.
Stage integrity controls honored (constitution phase-separation; SC->FR traceability; testify hash LOCKED in context.json + git note).
One evidence-tag family only; no mixed Spanish/English tag sets.
Zero placeholder tokens; no invented prices; no client PII; single brand.
Next-step suggestion emitted from next-step.sh with model tier and dashboard link.
